inputs.label: Milliliters per Teaspoon
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor; 5 for metric, 4.92892 for US customary, 5.91939 for UK imperial

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor; 5 for metric, 4.92892 for US customary, 5.91939 for UK imperial
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm faktörü; metrik için 5, ABD geleneksel için 4.92892, İngiltere emperyal için 5.91939

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the result
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses

inputs.label: Number of Conversions
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for batch scaling (e.g., number of identical portions)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for batch scaling (e.g., number of identical portions)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplu ölçekleme çarpanı (örneğin, aynı porsiyon sayısı)

breakdown: Step 1: Convert teaspoons to base milliliters (teaspoons × milliliters per teaspoon).
Step 2: Scale by the number of conversions (batch factor).
Step 3: Round the result to the specified decimal places.
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
